summary: Iteration 36 - Pre-Practice Intelligence Layer + Guided Start Flow testing. All 28 backend tests passed. All frontend tests passed. The 3-phase CreatePracticePage flow (Select → Prepare → Confirm) works correctly with pre-start intelligence blocks.
critical_code_review_comments: GET /api/catalog/{practice_id}/pre-start endpoint correctly returns all intelligence blocks: orientation, entity_direction, checklist, auth, ateco, readiness, timing, who_acts_summary, proof_expected
Readiness states correctly computed: ready_to_start for simple procedures, ready_with_warnings for complex procedures with many requirements, likely_wrong_practice when client_type doesn't match
ATECO block correctly shows relevant=true for VAT/business procedures (VAT_OPEN_PF) and relevant=false for internal procedures (DOC_MISSING_REQUEST)
Entity direction block correctly shows for official procedures and is null for internal/support procedures
Checklist includes document_specs, auth credentials (when auth_method set), and preconditions
CreatePracticePage 3-phase flow works: Phase 1 (Select) → Phase 2 (Prepare) → Phase 3 (Confirm)

All data-testid attributes present and working: phase-indicator, client-type-*, procedure-selector, go-to-prepare, orientation-block, entity-block, checklist-block, auth-block, ateco-block, who-acts-block, readiness-block, back-to-select, go-to-confirm, client-name-input, fiscal-code-input, vat-number-input, description-input, confirm-summary, back-to-prepare, submit-practice, confirm-create-btn
Back navigation between phases works correctly
Practice creation via confirm dialog works and redirects to practice detail page
seed_data_creation: Test practice created via Playwright (TEST_Playwright_User) - can be cleaned up
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 36 tested Pre-Practice Intelligence Layer. All tests passed. Key verified: (1) GET /api/catalog/{practice_id}/pre-start returns all intelligence blocks. (2) Readiness states: ready_to_start, ready_with_warnings, likely_wrong_practice work correctly based on client_type and procedure requirements. (3) ATECO block shows relevant=true for VAT_OPEN_PF (business procedure) and relevant=false for DOC_MISSING_REQUEST (internal). (4) Entity direction shows for official procedures, null for internal. (5) Checklist includes documents, auth credentials, preconditions. (6) CreatePracticePage 3-phase flow: Select (client type + procedure) → Prepare (pre-start intelligence) → Confirm (form + create). (7) All data-testid attributes work. (8) Back navigation works between phases. (9) Practice creation via confirm dialog works.

details: orientation, checklist, auth, ateco, readiness, timing, who_acts_summary blocks present
practice_name, practice_description, category, is_official, suitable_for_client_type present
VAT_OPEN_PF has entity_direction with entity_name, submission_channel
Checklist includes document_specs with key, label, mandatory, type
Checklist includes auth credential when auth_method set
ATECO relevant=true for VAT_OPEN_PF with reason and guidance
state, label, color, can_start, message, issues, mandatory_count present
VAT_OPEN_PF with private shows likely_wrong_practice when not suitable
data-testid orientation-block shows procedure name and description
data-testid entity-block shows entity name and direction
data-testid readiness-block shows state and issues
client-name-input, fiscal-code-input, vat-number-input, description-input all work
data-testid back-to-select and back-to-prepare work correctly
After creation, redirects to /practices/{id} detail page
